title: Play Sudoku Without Ads or an Account
description: Sudoku Pilot is free and has no ads, paid tier, account requirement, token system, or other monetization layer.
intro: Sudoku Pilot is free. There are no ads, subscriptions, paid hints, lives, token packs, or account prompts. The current app has no monetization layer.

sections.heading: The coach is part of the free app

blocks.text: Puzzle generation, candidate tools, every hint level, technique automation, and focused practice are available without a payment or an ad view.
There is no token balance, daily hint limit, premium technique list, or mistake counter that ends a game.

sections.heading: Hints open without an ad break

blocks.text: The technique clue and its full explanation are next to each other. You can move between them without waiting for a video or closing a promotion.
There are no reward videos, streaks, or lives. Close the app when you are done and return to the saved board later.
The current grid, pencil notes, preferences, and undo history live in local browser storage. Closing the tab keeps your progress on that device.
There is no account backend or cross-device sync. Clear local data in the More panel removes the saved puzzle and preferences from the current browser.

sections.heading: Screenshot recognition has no direct charge

blocks.text: Screenshot OCR is an optional online action. The selected image is sent to Sudoku OCR through RapidAPI for recognition. Sudoku Pilot does not ask for payment information or charge users for each scan.
Scans can be unavailable when the site's provider quota is exhausted. Generated puzzles, manual entry, and ordinary gameplay continue without the OCR service.
